name: Arch Capital Group Ltd. Depositary Shares each Representing a 1/1000th Interest in a 4.550% Non-Cumulative Preferred Share Series G
summary: Arch Capital Group Ltd. is a global insurance and reinsurance company, offering a wide range of products including property, casualty, and mortgage insurance and reinsurance lines. The company is headquartered in Hamilton, Bermuda. These depositary shares represent a fractional interest in Arch Capital's preferred shares.
